channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Apple’s new Studio displays come with Thunderbolt 5
item.description: The new displays come with better cameras, new sound systems, and Thunderbolt 5 ports.

item.title: MacBook M5 Pro et Max : on vous explique le passage secret d’Apple vers l’architecture chiplet
item.description: Ce que vient de faire Apple avec sa "Fusion Architecture" est bien plus qu’une simple mise à jour annuelle. En passant au design chiplet, la marque à la pomme change radicalement sa façon de construire des processeurs.

item.title: 'She's a 10, but also decaying' — the five zombies from Resident Evil Requiem I wish I could be friends with
item.description: Sorry Leon, but these iconic zombies are the five Resident Evil Requiem characters I want to hang out with.

item.title: Apple's New MacBook Air and MacBook Pro Have New Chips, More Storage, and Higher Prices
item.description: Apple seems to be saving the entry-level MacBook for its event tomorrow, but instead, we have two new pricey Studio Display computer monitors.

item.title: Apple unveils M5 Pro and M5 Max chips with new ‘Fusion Architecture’
item.description: The chips are engineered around Apple's new Fusion Architecture, an advanced design that merges two dies into a single, high-performance system on a chip (SoC).

item.title: Apple just dropped the next-gen Studio Display and Studio Display XDR — here's what's new
item.description: Apple just updated its Studio Display with an upgraded camera, more advanced ports, and better sound, but it also ushered in a new Studio Display XDR to replace the Pro Display XDR.

item.title: Nouveau MacBook Air : plus puissant, plus de stockage, pour (presque) le même prix
item.description: Tous les constructeurs souffrent de la flambée des prix de la mémoire. Tous ? Non ! Apple résiste encore et toujours avec le tout nouveau MacBook Air qui, non content d’intégrer une puce M5, offre le double de stockage pour (presque) le même prix.

item.title: The 6G, modular, robot phones of the future
item.description: Year after year, we mostly know what to expect from our smartphone upgrades. Galaxy, iPhone, Pixel, or whatever else, everything seems to get slightly better (and occasionally more expensive) without many surprises in store. That's not to say there are no new ideas left in smartphones, though. You just have to know where to look. […]

item.title: Puces M5 Pro et M5 Max : Apple décuple la puissance des MacBook Pro avec l’architecture Fusion
item.description: Apple annonce ses toutes nouvelles puces M5 Pro et M5 Max, basées sur une architecture inédite, pour propulser sa nouvelle génération d'ordinateurs portables.

item.title: Xiaomi, unlike Google and Samsung, thinks camera hardware comes first
item.description: When it launched the 17 and 17 Ultra in Europe on Saturday, Xiaomi bucked an industry trend: it didn't really talk about AI all that much. And it really didn't talk about AI when it showed off the two phones' cameras, including a special edition 17 Ultra co-created with Leica. According to Angus Ng, the […]

item.title: As a comic book fan, TCL showed me my dream smartphone at MWC 2026
item.description: TCL combines its NXTPAPER tech with AMOLED to create this comic nerd’s dream phone.

item.title: The MacBook Air M5 starts at $1,099, up $100 from the M4
item.description: Reports had suggested that Apple wasn’t going to reveal a refreshed MacBook Air with an M5 chip during its week of announcements, but whaddyaknow? Apple just went ahead and did that exact thing. Let’s deal with the bad news first: Apple is reverting a price cut from last year. It dropped the M4-powered MBA’s starting price down to $999, but for the M5-equipped model, you’ll need to shell out at least $1,099.The company claimed the M5 MacBook Air will be able to deliver four times faster performance in AI tasks than the M4 MBA. Compared with the M1 MacBook Air, you’ll get up to 9.5 times faster...

item.title: Windows 11 vous laissera configurer la touche Impr écran de votre clavier
item.description: Plus de possibilités pour une touche souvent utilisée.

item.title: Blue Prince headlines Nintendo’s lineup of Switch 2 indie games
item.description: Following a Direct in February and a Pokémon-focused event last week, Nintendo returned today with a showcase focused on indie games. And it ended with a big one: the absorbing, room-shifting puzzle game Blue Prince is launching on the Switch 2. Even better, it'll be available later today. The rest of the titles revealed during […]

item.title: Why is SpaceX going public?
item.description: I am excited about the SpaceX IPO for all the reasons investors shouldn't be. Maybe it'll be a real marquee moment for Silicon Valley, but I see the potential for a shitshow. After all, more than a decade ago, Musk said that SpaceX going public before going to Mars would be bad for the company. […]

item.title: Game Pass en mars 2026 : Cyberpunk 2077, Hollow Knight Silksong, KCD2… Voici la première vague de jeux du mois
item.description: Microsoft frappe fort avec les premières sorties de mars sur le Game Pass ! Outre les récents Hollow Knight : Silksong et Kingdom Come : Deliverance II, Cyberpunk 2077 arrive également sur console et sur le cloud.

item.title: The MacBook Air M5 has landed — here's what's new on our favorite laptop
item.description: Apple has just updated its most popular laptop – here's what's new in the MacBook Air M5.

item.title: Apple’s new Studio Display XDR adds a Mini LED upgrade
item.description: After a few years between updates, Apple has two new 5K monitor options, ranging from expensive to very expensive, with the 27-inch 5K Studio Display and Studio Display XDR. Both have 5,120 x 2,880 resolutions and 12MP Center Stage cameras embedded inside - we'll be eager to see how much better those are this time […]

item.title: Apple unveils the M5 Pro and M5 Max chips, which feature new, faster 'super cores'
item.description: As part of its big week of announcements, Apple has unveiled a new pair of M5 chips alongside two new MacBooks. The new M5 Pro and M5 Max chips will power the new MacBook Pro that was just announced today, while the new MacBook Air comes with the base M5. According to the company’s press release, the M5 Pro and M5 Max come with an “advanced GPU with Neural Accelerators and higher unified memory bandwidth for a massive increase in AI compute.”At the heart of the M5 Pro and M5 Max are what Apple is calling a new “Fusion Architecture” that “combines two dies into a single system on a chip (SoC).”...

item.title: Apple brings its M5 Pro and Max silicon to the next MacBook Pro generation
item.description: It happened much later than we expected, but Apple's announcement of MacBook Pros with its M5 Pro and M5 Max chips has finally arrived. These more powerful variants on Apple's silicon will be available in the 14-inch and 16-inch models of the laptops. Pre-orders will open on March 4 with an expected ship date of March 11. You’ll want to save some extra coin this time, though, as prices have gone up compared to the prior generation. The new 14-inch MacBook Pro can be kitted out with either an M5 Pro or M5 Max. The Pro option for the chip boasts a CPU with 15 or 18 CPU cores and 16 or 20 GPU cor...

item.title: Ne perdez plus les pédales avec le compteur GPS vélo Garmin Edge 540 à -52 % et son GNSS multi-bandes ultra précis
item.description: Pour tous les cyclistes avertis qui souhaitent un compagnon sérieux et endurant lors de toutes leurs sorties, voici le compteur GPS Garmin Edge 540 vendu 176,56 euros sur AliExpress au lieu de 369,99 euros.

item.title: MacBook Air M5 : Apple renouvelle son MacBook le plus léger avec de belles surprises
item.description: Le nouveau MacBook Air est officiel. Cette année 2026, Apple ne change pas la recette, mais fait une simple mise à niveau de la puce. Il se dote désormais d'une puce Apple M5.

item.title: Apple’s M5 Pro and M5 Max MacBook Pros Are Performance Monsters
item.description: Pick your choice of 14-inch or 16-inch laptops with the blazing fast Apple chips.

item.title: Apple launches M5 Pro and M5 Max chips
item.description: Apple has just announced two new processors: the M5 Pro and M5 Max. The new chips will power the MacBook Pro it revealed on Tuesday, offering an 18-core CPU and a new "Fusion Architecture" that integrates two 3nm dies into a single system-on-a-chip (SoC). The CPU's 18-core setup includes six super cores and 12 new […]

item.title: En lecture (Now Playing) : la fonction d’identification musicale des Pixel devient une application autonome sur le Play Store
item.description: Jusqu’ici cachée dans les entrailles d’Android, la fonction En écoute des Google Pixel arrive sur le Play Store sous la forme d’une application à part entière, avec un historique enrichi et une interface dédiée.

item.title: C’est incompréhensible, le prix du MacBook Air M4 baisse alors que la RAM augmente
item.description: La logique voudrait que les prix augmentent. Les coûts des puces de RAM explosent, les stocks sont au plus bas, et pourtant, le MacBook Air M4 passe sous la barre des 1 000 €.

item.title: Les MacBook Pro enfin équipés de puces M5 Pro et M5 Max… Trop peu, trop tard ?
item.description: C'était le secret le moins bien gardé d'Apple : les MacBook Pro se déclinent maintenant avec des puces M5 Pro et M5 Max. Quoi de plus normal, après le lancement en octobre dernier du MacBook Pro M5 tout court. Mais attention, ces nouvelles machines risquent d'avoir une durée de vie très courte…

item.title: Pied réglable, 120 Hz et Mini-LED : Apple corrige (enfin) les plus gros défauts de son écran Studio Display XDR
item.description: Apple vient de rafraîchir sa gamme de moniteurs pour les créatifs, les Studio Display. Au programme : une mise à jour du Studio Display classique et surtout l'arrivée d'un tout nouveau « Studio Display XDR » qui emprunte le meilleur du Pro Display XDR dans un format plus compact de 27 pouces. On fait le point.

item.title: Voici les nouveaux MacBook Pro M5 Pro et M5 Max : toujours plus puissants
item.description: Apple dévoile ce mardi 3 mars 2026 sa nouvelle génération de MacBook Pro avec les puces Apple M5 Pro et M5 Max.

item.title: Apple reveals its new 5K mini-LED Studio Display XDR
item.description: Apple continues its gradual unveiling of new products this week with the launch of the Studio Display and an all-new 27-inch Studio Display XDR. The latter is a higher-end model aimed at content creators with a 27-inch 5K Retina XDR display that features a mini-LED display with 2,000-plus dimming zones, up to 2,000 nits of peak HDR brightness and a wider color gamut for improved accuracy. It also has a 120Hz refresh rate, addressing complaints about the relatively anemic 60Hz refresh rate of previous models. It also addresses a longstanding user ergonomic complaint with a new tilt- and height-...

item.title: Apple announces M5 MacBook Air and updated MacBook Pro
item.description: Apple is launching an upgraded MacBook Air featuring the M5 chip along with new MacBook Pro models featuring the M5 Pro and M5 Max. Announced on Tuesday, the new Macs will all be available for pre-order starting March 4th with availability in stores starting March 11th. In addition to the M5 chip, the new MacBook […]

item.title: The Apple MacBook Pro M5 Pro and M5 Max are official — here's what's new
item.description: Apple has announced new MacBook Pros with M5 Pro and M5 Pro Max chips — and they look like laptop powerhouses.

item.title: Ditch the laptop! This enterprise-ready HP OmniDesk desktop is built for business - and it's got a $590 discount and a free USB drive right now
item.description: HP OmniDesk desktop packs a 20-core Core i7-14700 processor, 64GB of DDR5 memory, and a massive 4TB SSD.

item.title: ‘Starfleet Academy’ Showrunner Teases Shocking Conclusion to Season 2
item.description: Plus, work's already begun on 'Mortal Kombat 3'.

item.title: GoPro’s next cameras are coming soon with a brand-new chip
item.description: GoPro has announced a new processor today that the company says will "power GoPro's next generation of cameras across current and future products" - and will debut in cameras launching in Q2 2026. There were no details shared about what cameras GoPro plans to launch in the coming months, but the company says its new […]

item.title: Elgato’s Stream Deck Plus XL has more buttons, more dials, and a larger touchscreen
item.description: After supersizing its Stream Deck controller into a product designed for professional broadcast environments in 2024, Elgato is giving a similar treatment to the three-year-old Stream Deck Plus. The new Stream Deck Plus XL is essentially the same product as the original, but with more macro buttons, more dials, a wider touchscreen, and a bigger […]

item.title: Fig Security emerges from stealth with $38M to help security teams deal with change
item.description: Fig traces data flows in the security stack and then alerts security teams when changes at any point affect detection or response capabilities.

item.title: How to watch NCIS: Origins season 2 — stream part 2 of Gibbs prequel series
item.description: With Gibbs and Diane hitched, the young agent faces the reactions of his teammates. Here's how to watch NCIS: Origins season 2, part 2 online and from anywhere.

item.title: 'The attack requires no exploit, no user clicks, and no explicit request forsensitive actions': Experts say Perplexity's AI Comet browser can be hijacked to steal your passwords
item.description: Security researchers found a zero-click exploit in Perplexity AI browser, and helped fix it.

item.title: Shure's next-gen DAI adds mobile support
item.description: XLR microphone owners, rejoice: Shure's successor to the MVX2U Digital Audio Interface (DAI) brings the adapter into the mobile era. The compact MVX2U Gen 2 adds more advanced onboard audio processing. But its most notable upgrade is mobile device compatibility, so you're no longer limited to desktop use.The single-channel MVX2U Gen 2 provides up to +60dB of gain and 48V phantom power. On the processing front, the adapter includes an auto-level mode. There’s also a real-time denoiser to minimize background noise and a pop filter ("Popper Stopper" in Shure marketing-speak) to soften those harsh...

item.title: OpenAI's AI data agent, built by two engineers, now serves 4,000 employees — and the company says anyone can replicate it
item.description: When an OpenAI finance analyst needed to compare revenue across geographies and customer cohorts last year, it took hours of work — hunting through 70,000 datasets, writing SQL queries, verifying table schemas. Today, the same analyst types a plain-English question into Slack and gets a finished chart in minutes.The tool behind that transformation was built by two engineers in three months. Seventy percent of its code was written by AI. And it is now used by more than 4,000 of OpenAI's roughly 5,000 employees every day — making it one of the most aggressive deployments of an AI data agent insi...

item.title: Meta's AI display glasses reportedly share intimate videos with human moderators
item.description: Users of Meta's AI smart glasses in Europe may be unknowingly sharing intimate video and sensitive financial information with moderators outside of the bloc, according to a report from Sweden's Svenska Dagbladet released last week. Employees in Kenya doing AI "annotation" told the journalists that they've seen people nude, using the toilet and engaging in sexual activity, along with credit card numbers and other sensitive information. With Meta's Ray-Ban Display and other glasses with AI capabilities, users can record what they're looking at or get answers to questions via a Meta AI assistant...

item.title: The Herman Miller Jarvis is one of the best standing desks we've ever tested, with phenomenal build quality and impressive lifting capacity — and it's 25% off right now
item.description: The Jarvis standing desk has everything I want in a height-adjustable setup, including excellent stability from its sturdy 1-inch laminate top and solid three-stage frame.

item.title: The third Witcher 3 DLC rumored to be a build up to The Witcher 4 will reportedly take place near the familiar location of Velen
item.description: CD Projekt Red is reportedly planning to release a third expansion for The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt ahead of The Witcher 4, and now a new rumor suggests it will be set in a familiar location.

item.title: Ces sacoches vélo Decathlon se transforment en banane, en plus d’être abordables
item.description: Disponibles en deux versions de 6 ou 10 litres, les sacoches vélo Rockrider ADVT 500 à fixer au guidon arrivent à point nommé pour les aventures, sans casser la tirelire.

item.title: I tested the GMKtec NucBox K13 - and this AI mini PC is an excellent example of what Intel does well
item.description: The GMKtec NucBox K13 uses a modern Intel Lunar Lake processor and showcases its strengths in the mini-PC space.

item.title: À peine lancés, les Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 Pro profitent déjà d’une remise de 100 € chez Boulanger
item.description: Samsung a officialisé ses Galaxy Buds 4 Pro. Des écouteurs qui se démarquent par une réduction de bruit d'une excellente qualité. Chez Boulanger, les nouveaux venus de la marque coréenne perdent déjà 100 euros de leur prix grâce à un code promo et un bonus reprise.

item.title: Shark UV Reveal Review (2026): UV Light Mode
item.description: The UV light built into Shark’s newest robot vacuum is on a quest to embarrass me with how many stains it's spotted.

item.title: Shark's new robovac has a UV light to make your grubby floors glow — before scrubbing them clean again
item.description: Not convinced your robot vacuum is doing anything? Shark's new bot has a clever way to show you.

item.title: Endor Labs launches free tool AURI after study finds only 10% of AI-generated code is secure
item.description: Endor Labs, the application security startup backed by more than $208 million in venture funding, today launched AURI, a platform that embeds real-time security intelligence directly into the AI coding tools that are reshaping how software gets built. The product is available free to individual developers and integrates natively with popular AI coding assistants including Cursor, Claude, and Augment through the Model Context Protocol (MCP).The announcement arrives against a sobering backdrop. While 90% of development teams now use AI coding assistants, research published in December by Carnegi...

item.title: The startup that turned Texas’s book ban law into big business
item.description: Bookmarked’s software promises districts cover under SB 13. Whether that looks like oversight or overreach depends on whom you ask. In 2023, as Texas lawmakers debated Senate Bill 13—a controversial bill aimed at restricting certain books in public school libraries and expanding parental oversight—Steve Wandler was among the dozen-plus parents, educators, and advocates who testified before the legislature. Wandler wasn’t just another concerned citizen. He was a Canadian entrepreneur who had relocated to Texas the year before to found Bookmarked, a fledgling startup that promises to help school...

item.title: HBO Max va mettre fin au partage de mot de passe partout dans le monde en 2026
item.description: Après une période de test, le service de streaming va étendre sa lutte contre le partage de mots de passe à l’échelle mondiale en 2026.

item.title: ‘I can think of a couple Pretti Good reasons!’: Hacktivists may have just cracked open ICE and exposed over 6,000 companies working with the DHS
item.description: Hacktivists have exposed data relating to over 6,000 private companies and their dealings with ICE and the DHS.

item.title: Bridgerton star Luke Thompson teaches Jimmy Fallon an elegant dance from the show
item.description: "Bridgerton" star Luke Thompson appeared on "The Tonight Show" and taught Jimmy Fallon one of the dances from the show.

item.title: Everything announced at Nintendo Indie World: all Switch and Switch 2 game reveals
item.description: Our live coverage of the March 2026 Nintendo Indie World showcase.

item.title: Huawei debuts its Atlas 950 AI SuperPoD at MWC 2026, taking the AI data center fight to Nvidia and AMD
item.description: Atlas 950 AI SuperPoD goes global as Huawei challenges Nvidia and AMD in data center computing.

item.title: We’ve Got Terrible News for the Dozen People Who Love ‘The Mummy: Tomb of the Dragon Emperor’
item.description: Radio Silence, who are directing the new Brendan Fraser and Rachel Weisz 'Mummy,' reveal whether the third film is canon or not.

item.title: Bethesda’s Xbox-exclusive Starfield may have finally received a PS5 launch date according to a reliable industry leaker
item.description: A new leak suggests Bethesda's Starfield may finally have a PlayStation 5 release date following long-running rumors.

item.title: 'The missing link between still photography and motion picture photography’ – Jeff Bridges loves the Widelux panoramic film camera so much, he just revived it
item.description: Bridging the gap: A-list actor Jeff Bridges reveals the first two production cameras of his resurrected WideluxX panoramic camera line with a rotating lens

item.title: HP is mining its own e-waste to build its latest laptops
item.description: Recycling startup Mint Innovation partnered with the tech giant to make the industry’s first batch of closed-loop recycled copper from old HP computers and printers. Inside a new HP laptop, the copper in its heat sink comes straight from old HP devices—making the company the first to reuse its own recycled metal in a closed loop.

item.title: Did the Olympics turn you into a women’s hockey fan? You’re not alone—and StubHub has a new site for you
item.description: With the start of Women’s History Month, the ticket platform is launching a centralized hub for women’s sports—and it’s here to stay. Gold-medal moments for American athletes abounded at the 2026 Winter Olympics. Among a slew of highlights, Alysa Liu brought the U.S. Olympic gold in singles figure skating for the first time since 2002, Breezy Johnson and Mikaela Shiffrin topped the podium in Alpine skiing. The Paralympics, which start March 6, will likely see more medals for women athletes, and many of them will be celebrating in Las Vegas this summer....

item.title: Paris Londres en vingt minutes, l’hyperloop européen relance le rêve des transports du futur
item.description: Relier les grandes capitales européennes en un clin d'oeil n'est peut-être plus une simple utopie. Dans le nord des Pays-Bas, un centre d'essais teste actuellement des capsules en lévitation capables de pulvériser tous les records de vitesse terrestre.

item.title: Charlie Brown now works for Sony
item.description: Sony Music Entertainment Japan and Sony Pictures Entertainment now officially own 80 percent of the Peanuts franchise. The companies have closed the deal, which was officially announced in December 2025 when it was still subject to regulatory approvals, for $460 million. Sony Music Japan has owned 39 percent of Peanuts since 2018, so the Sony subsidiaries are essentially buying 41 percent of the franchise from Canadian firm WildBrain with this transaction. Now that the acquisition is done, Peanuts is officially a consolidated Sony subsidiary. The Peanuts universe started as comic strips by Cha...

item.title: Amazon promises 'seven days of epic savings' in its upcoming Spring Deal Days sale later this month — I've found the 17 best early deals
item.description: Amazon UK has announced that its Spring Deal Days sale will start later this month — here's everything you need to know and our pick of the best early deals worth shopping now.

item.title: Score the Eufy L60 robot vacuum at its best-ever price at Amazon — save $200
item.description: As of March 3, the Eufy L60 robot vacuum is marked down to $199.99 at Amazon, 50% off its list price of $399.99.
